title: leadv2 Shadow Proposal
description: A shadow A/B proposal emitted by leadv2-learn.js and applied by leadv2-shadow-apply.sh. risk_level is REQUIRED and written at proposal-emit time (not derived at apply time). Proposal is in exactly one status state at all times (D10).

id.description: Stable sha1 of (task_id + kind + target_file). Used as flock target and idempotency key.

task_id.description: Task that generated this proposal. Always a value, never a key.

kind.description: Proposal type from leadv2-learn.js kind enum.

risk_level.description: Risk classification encoded at proposal-emit time by learn.js classification rules (not derived at apply time). low = auto shadow-apply eligible; high = founder-gated. Resolves C-critical-2 / D3.

target_file.description: Repo-relative path to the file this proposal modifies.

before_snapshot.description: Path to the .bak snapshot file written before any mutation (docs/leadv2/shadow/snapshots/<sha1>.bak). Written by shadow-apply.sh at promote time. Resolves C-critical-1 / D7.

diff_patch.description: Unified diff string to apply with patch -p1. Written by learn.js at proposal time.

arm.description: Shadow A/B arm this proposal is applied to. Determined by hash(task_id)%2.

status.description: Proposal state machine state. Exactly one state at a time (D10).

proposed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when learn.js emitted the proposal.

min_n_per_arm.description: Minimum number of tasks per A/B arm required before any promotion decision. Inconclusive (< min_n) = extend, never auto-promote (D4).

title.description: Human-readable title surfacing cross-repo origin and pattern summary (cross-repo-pattern kind only, D21).

repos.description: Source repo names where the cross-repo pattern was detected (cross-repo-pattern kind only, D21).

keywords.description: Keyword stems matched across repos (cross-repo-pattern kind only, D16).

representative_summary.description: Representative pattern summary from the highest seen_count member (cross-repo-pattern kind only).

members_count.description: Total number of pattern instances grouped into this cross-repo proposal.
